title: Engeyo Paartha Mayakkam Lyrics Yaaradi Nee Mohini

Yengeyo paartha mayakkam

varuvadhu innum
maayam maayam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Engeyo Paartha Mayakkam expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Yaaradi Nee Mohini, this song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards their love interest, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer Udit Narayan, known for his melodious voice in many Tamil hits.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Engeyo Paartha Mayakkam was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, a prominent figure in the Tamil music industry.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 9, 2008, as part of the movie Yaaradi Nee Mohini.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Engeyo Paartha Mayakkam is a romantic melody that beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing experienced by the characters in Yaaradi Nee Mohini. The song's lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. Udit Narayan's soulful rendition adds to the song's charm, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Overall, it conveys the magic of love and the emotions that come with it.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Engeyo Paartha Mayakkam from the movie Yaaradi Nee Mohini, where Udit Narayan's soulful voice beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. This melodious track, crafted by the talented Yuvan Shankar Raja, resonates with anyone who has ever felt the magic of romance. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with captivating melodies.
stanzaMeanings: Can you feel her? Is your heart speaking to her? Can you feel the love? Yes.
Wherever I see, the enchantment always comes to this path, the divine presence is still a mystery.
When the eyes open and look, the heart believes in God today.
Still, the eyes do not open; the beauty is like a flower blooming in a garden.
The curse that came to break the heart is a desire that confuses the mind.
Seeing her brings enough joy to the heart everywhere.
In dreams, I see tomorrow; I look ahead, and in stories, I keep looking back at the girl.
There and here, the feet are restless; the heart is still longing in this place.
What is it, what is it? The heart breaks like a mirror.
Seeing a poem, the eyes get lost; I too ask all the questions that the rain brings.
Wherever I see, the enchantment always comes to this path, the divine presence is still a mystery.
When the eyes open and look, the heart believes in God today.
Forgetting the initial beauty, I came close to you; I saw you and realized the time to bloom is now.
In this abandoned house, flowers are blooming today; is this the answer to your half of God?
Floating, floating, breaking, breaking, swirling, swirling, wandering, wandering.
In this moment, being reborn, merging into you, losing and losing.
